title: AEROX PVP 16x
body:
# AEROX PVP 16x

AEROX is a 16x PVP oriented texture that I released on the occasion of hitting 100 subscribers (a while back now). The pack was made for 1.8 and 1.7 combat in mind (duels, bedwars, etc.)

The pack retextures most blocks and items, there is a however a focus on PVP items (swords, armor, wool, buckets, etc.) Most items in bedwars or skywars will have been modified by the texture pack. It features smaller swords and is purple themed. The pack works well with optifine or just plain vanilla.

I personally really like this pack for its attention to detail and its purple accent. Overall, it's a go-to PVP pack!

Here's the link to the [showcase video](https://youtu.be/-l0kqxHoYHE):
